prompt: This toolkit can score how cleanly a dataset was partitioned into groups, giving each point a value for how well it sits in its own group versus the nearest other one. Where is that per-point score actually computed, and what guard refuses the request when the number of groups is degenerate (fewer than two, or as many as there are samples)?

must_surface: the validity guard on label count
rubric.answer_shape: one location computing the score, one guard rejecting degenerate label counts

evidence.claim: raises when the group count is degenerate

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
